productDisplayName: Nike Women Navy Blue Track Pant
description: Style NoteBuilt with the breathability and zero-distraction Fit that athletes demand, these trackpants come in a body-friendly design. These high-performance pants are great for a day out on the field and are designed for Sports with their Dri-Fit technology. Team them with a T-shirt and trainers.Product DetailsNavy Blue trackpants, has an elastic waistband with a nike swoosh on the left, has a contrast panel below the waistband at the back, has a snug fit at the waist, curves around the hip and thigh with a slight flare below the kneeMaterial and CareBody 61% cotton, 33% polyester & 6% spandex and gusset 100% polyester Machine wash separately in cold water using a mild detergentDo not bleachTumble dry lowCool iron do not iron on decorationsSize and fitRegular fit
